items.title: Circle
items.description: End-to-end social media thread platform built solo — authentication, post creation, follow system, and user profiles.

items.title: Real-time Trivia Game
items.description: Live multiplayer trivia game with real-time score updates and room management, built in a 4-person team.

items.title: School Attendance System
items.description: Web-based attendance system actively used in a school environment, with geolocation check-in and time-bound attendance codes.
